summaryForNext: SEED HYPOTHESIS WAS WRONG — the human-in-the-loop approval flow is ALREADY built end-to-end and genuinely PAUSES (not a fail-closed deny; the 'treated as a deny' comments at ag_ui.rs:245 + a2ui.rs:140 annotate only the no-handle fallback). Revised verdicts: G1 (end-to-end flow) MOSTLY MET — engine RequireApproval + ApprovalManager (register/decide/status) + AG-UI/A2UI pause+emit GATE_APPROVAL_REQUEST/gate:approval_request + pipeline.rs:783-833 read-upstream-only-while-no-pending + resolve_approval flush/deny + POST /approvals/{id}/decision all wired (SSE+NDJSON); only gaps = stale comments + no in-band client decision channel (Admin-REST-only). G2 (operator surface) NOT MET — no GET /approvals list, no ApprovalManager iterate method (only single-id status(); len/is_empty are #[cfg(test)]), no web UI at all (no pages/Approvals.tsx, no /approvals route, no approval client fn/hook/type). G3 (fail-closed lifecycle) NOT MET and is the GENUINE SAFETY GAP + highest priority: the paused stream awaits approval_rx.recv() at pipeline.rs:821 with NO tokio::time::timeout / TTL deadline -> an undecided approval HANGS THE STREAM FOREVER (TTL enforced only inside decide(), i.e. only if a decision arrives); purge_expired (approval/mod.rs:158) is DEFINED BUT NEVER CALLED (no janitor) -> pending entries leak; no approval config in config/types.rs (300s TTL is a hardcoded constant). BUILD ORDER SHOULD INVERT THE SEED: G3 first (close the fail-open-to-hang), then G2, then G1 (comment fix + verification). Zero new deps expected (tokio::time::timeout, DashMap iterate, axum GET, React admin kit). ApprovalManager is IN-MEMORY PER-REPLICA (DashMap) — decision must reach the replica holding the paused stream; multi-replica reachability is the key open question (likely a documented single-replica constraint this phase). 5 open questions for Analyze: (1) G3 timeout must AUTO-DENY the held call (emit deny + resume to termination) — where does the deadline live (timeout on recv keyed on nearest expires_at vs per-approval timer)?; (2) add approval:{enabled?,ttl_seconds?} to config vs keep constant + add janitor only?; (3) G2 multi-replica single-replica-constraint-this-phase vs in-scope?; (4) G1 in-band decision channel deferred (REST+UI suffices) vs a goal?; (5) G2 UI new Approvals tab + poll-refresh. Each change touches approval/stream/authz -> separated security review each; G3's auto-deny (fail-closed, not silent-drop) is the highest-priority security item. Federate any JWKS IdM (Ory ref) never an IdP; admin 4457 stays private; LLM-ops out of scope.
